Frequently Asked Questions

Is my data stored in India?+
Yes. All Safzzo customer data is stored on AWS Mumbai (ap-south-1) servers, ensuring your data never leaves India's jurisdiction.
Can I cancel anytime?+
Absolutely. No long-term contracts. Cancel monthly plans anytime; annual plans receive a pro-rated refund within 30 days.
Do you support Tamil and regional languages?+
Yes. Our products support Tamil, Hindi, and English interfaces with more regional languages coming soon.
Is a GST invoice provided?+
Yes. All purchases receive a proper GST invoice from Safzzo Software Private Limited, Salem, Tamil Nadu.
What onboarding support is included?+
All plans include live onboarding from our Salem team. Enterprise plans get a dedicated account manager and free data migration.
India
